/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/src/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/src/BenchmarkGUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/src/Client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/src/SharedMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/src/Futex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zerorpc_gui.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o -o zerorpc_gui  /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.56
